section_miscategorizations.text: The patient denies blood in stool.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported review-of-systems type symptom denial, not an exam, lab, or imaging finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports tenderness on the medial joint line of his knee and a slight feeling of instability in his left knee.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Medial joint line tenderness is typically an exam finding; however, it is framed as patient-reported and does not substantially mislead the reader if left in HPI.

section_miscategorizations.text: The clinician plans a cervical MRI.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A cervical MRI is anatomically unrelated to the right knee complaint and appears incongruent with the rest of the plan; if intentional, it would require diagnostic justification in the Assessment rather than appearing as an unexplained plan item.
